steps.title: Identify the core task
steps.content: The student needs to compare the vitamin C content of brussels sprouts and apples.

steps.title: Match the comparison requirement
steps.content:
Choice B directly fulfills this by comparing both foods — stating that brussels sprouts and apples both contain vitamin C, but brussels sprouts contain more.

Choices A, C, and D either present data without comparison, classify by food type, or discuss vitamin C sourcing without comparing the two.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
